name: Account Intent Shift Brief
description: Single-account narrative explaining a meaningful shift in engagement — what changed, who's engaging, what signals surfaced, what action makes sense. Replaces the cross-functional reconstruction meeting where AE / SDR / marketing each share part of the picture.
alsoSurfaces: What's happening at this account right now?
Who in the buying group is engaging, and on what topics?
How material is this trajectory shift, with what confidence?
Which contacts should the AE / SDR reach out to next, and how?
beforeWeRun: Which account — by name or Salesforce ID (required)?

whatYoullGet.name: Account summary
whatYoullGet.desc: Account name, industry, size, tier, owner, current opportunity status — the framing snapshot.

whatYoullGet.name: Trajectory shift
whatYoullGet.desc: Names the shift with magnitude, cites the specific weeks where engagement changed, with confidence rating.

whatYoullGet.name: Signal breakdown
whatYoullGet.desc: Two paragraphs on who's engaging, signal mix, topics (if intent data present), and chronological highlights of recent material signals.

whatYoullGet.name: Buying-group composition
whatYoullGet.desc: Markdown table of contacts who engaged in the window — name, title, seniority, signal count, last engagement.

whatYoullGet.name: Recommended outreach
whatYoullGet.desc: 2–4 specific recommendations: which contacts to reach out to, what topics to lead with, what angle to take.

callout: 3 quick inputs (one is the account itself), then Sage drafts your intent-shift brief in ~11 min.
